channel.title: Jason Cook Design — Writing
channel.description: Long-form writing from Jason Cook Design.

item.title: Why This Blog Exists
item.description: A short note on what this space is for — and why a working designer-engineer keeps a public notebook.

item.title: You're Not Building a Tool. You're Building an Organization. Treat it That Way.
item.description: RTX Spark puts a petaflop of AI power into a laptop. Soon, many builders will run autonomous agents on it, often without any real governance. The hardware problem is solved. The governance problem isn't.
